channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Krebs on Security, The Hacker News, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading

item.title: Claude Mythos Fears Startle Japan's Financial Services Sector
item.description: Global financial institutions are panicked over Anthropic's new superhacker AI model. Cyber experts aren't quite as worried....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Official SAP npm packages compromised to steal credentials
item.description: Multiple official SAP npm packages were compromised in what is believed to be a TeamPCP supply-chain attack to steal credentials and authentication tokens from developers' systems. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Popular WordPress redirect plugin hid dormant backdoor for years
item.description: The Quick Page/Post Redirect plugin, installed on more than 70,000 WordPress sites, had a backdoor added five years ago that allows injecting arbitrary code into users' sites. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Hackers exploit RCE flaws in Qinglong task scheduler for cryptomining
item.description: Hackers are exploiting two authentication bypass vulnerabilities in the Qinglong open-source task scheduling tool to deploy cryptominers on developers' servers. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Reverse Engineering With AI Unearths High-Severity GitHub Bug
item.description: Wiz used an AI reverse-engineering tool to pinpoint a vulnerability that previously would have been too costly and time-consuming to undertake....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: AI Finds 38 Security Flaws in Electronic Health Record Platform
item.description: Flaws in OpenEMR's platform — used by more than 100,000 healthcare providers — enabled database compromise, remote code execution, and data theft....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Hackers arrested for hijacking and selling 610,000 Roblox accounts
item.description: The Ukrainian police have arrested three individuals who hacked more than 610,000 Roblox gaming accounts and sold them for a profit of $225,000. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: SAP-Related npm Packages Compromised in Credential-Stealing Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers are sounding the alarm about a new supply chain attack campaign targeting SAP-related npm Packages with credential-stealing malware. According to reports from Aikido Security...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: cPanel, WHM emergency update fixes critical auth bypass bug
item.description: A critical vulnerability affecting all but the latest versions of cPanel and the WebHost Manager (WHM) dashboard could be exploited to obtain access to the control panel without authentication. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Vect 2.0 Ransomware Acts as Wiper, Thanks to Design Error
item.description: The emerging ransomware has been deployed against victims of the TeamPCP supply chain attacks, but organizations should think twice before paying for a decryptor....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: New Wave of DPRK Attacks Uses AI-Inserted npm Malware, Fake Firms, and RATs
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered malicious code in an npm package after a malicious package as a dependency to the project by Anthropic's Claude Opus large language model (LLM). The package i...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: European police dismantles €50 million crypto investment fraud ring
item.description: Austrian and Albanian authorities dismantled a criminal ring accused of running a large-scale cryptocurrency investment fraud operation that caused estimated losses of over €50 million ($58.5 million)...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Learning from the Vercel breach: Shadow AI & OAuth sprawl
item.description: A single third-party OAuth integration can become a direct path into your environment. Push explains how the Vercel breach shows a compromised OAuth app can lead to widespread impact across downstream...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Lotus Wiper Attack Targets Venezuelan Energy Firms, Utilities
item.description: An analysis of the destructive malware reveals sophisticated living-off-the-land (LotL) techniques and detailed strategies for the widespread deletion of data....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: GitHub fixes RCE flaw that gave access to millions of private repos
item.description: In early March, GitHub patched a critical remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2026-3854) that could have allowed attackers to access millions of private repositories. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Webinar: How to Automate Exposure Validation to Match the Speed of AI Attacks
item.description: In February 2026, researchers uncovered a shift that completely changed the game: threat actors are now using custom AI setups to automate attacks directly into the kill chain. We aren't just talking ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: What to Look for in an Exposure Management Platform (And What Most of Them Get Wrong)
item.description: Every security team has a version of the same story. The quarter ends with hundreds of vulnerabilities closed. The dashboards are bursting with green. Then someone in a leadership meeting asks: "So, a...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: CISA orders feds to patch Windows flaw exploited as zero-day
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to secure their Windows systems against a vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Critical cPanel Authentication Vulnerability Identified — Update Your Server Immediately
item.description: cPanel has released security updates to address a security issue impacting various authentication paths that could allow an attacker to obtain access to the control panel software. The problem affects...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: CISA Adds Actively Exploited ConnectWise and Windows Flaws to KEV
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added two security flaws impacting ConnectWise ScreenConnect and Microsoft Windows to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (K...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Microsoft says backend change broke Teams Free chat and calls
item.description: Microsoft is working to resolve a known issue that prevents some Microsoft Teams Free users from chatting and calling others. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 SQL Injection Exploited within 36 Hours of Disclosure
item.description: In yet another instance of threat actors quickly jumping on the exploitation bandwagon, a newly disclosed critical security flaw in BerriAI's LiteLLM Python package has come under active exploitation ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: BlueNoroff Uses Fake Zoom Calls to Turn Victims Into Attack Lures
item.description: The North Korean group is using stolen victim videos, AI-generated avatars, and fake Zoom calls to scale malware attacks against cryptocurrency executives....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Broken VECT 2.0 ransomware acts as a data wiper for large files
item.description: Researchers are warning that the VECT 2.0 ransomware has a problem in the way it handles encryption nonces that leads to permanently destroying larger files rather than encrypt them. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Hackers are exploiting a critical LiteLLM pre-auth SQLi flaw
item.description: Hackers are targeting sensitive information stored in the LiteLLM open-source large-language model (LLM) gateway by exploiting a critical vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-42208. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: NSA Chief During Snowden Affair Shares Regrets, Reflections 13 Years Later
item.description: Chris Inglis was the head civilian in charge at the NSA when the Snowden leaks exploded. He gets candid about mistakes the organization made, and what CISOs need to know about spotting potential threa...
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Feuding Ransomware Groups Leak Each Other's Data
item.description: When 0APT and KryBit attacked each other, they exposed infrastructure and operational data, giving defenders rare insight into ransomware operations....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Vidar Rises to Top of Chaotic Infostealer Market
item.description: The malware has filled the gap created by last year's law enforcement takedowns of Lumma and Rhadamanthys....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Video service Vimeo confirms Anodot breach exposed user data
item.description: Vimeo has disclosed that data belonging to some of its customers and users has been accessed without authorization following the recent breach at the Anodot data anomaly detection company. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Researchers Discover Critical GitHub CVE-2026-3854 RCE Flaw Exploitable via Single Git Push
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a critical security vulnerability impacting GitHub.com and GitHub Enterprise Server that could allow an authenticated user to obtain remote code exe...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News
